subject: keycap-cluster
composition: Six CYL-profile keycaps in a two-row editorial cluster: back row — stroke-only outline cap (left), deep blue alpha with bronze legend wash (centre, stepped 20px forward), deep blue alpha (right); front row — deep blue alpha (left), deep blue focal alpha with strong bronze legend wash (centre), stroke-only outline cap (right). Diagonal offset between rows mimics a freshly-tipped keycap tray. Splash ellipse in deep blue at 0.11 alpha behind the cluster. Bronze theme dot at upper-right margin. Deep blue accent pip at lower-right. Four filled blue caps carry oklch(0.40 0.18 265) body; inset dish surfaces step to oklch(0.45 0.18 265); CYL scoop arcs in warm near-white oklch(0.92 0.025 85) so they read on the dark blue. Bronze legend-face wash on centre alpha (back-middle) and focal alpha (front-centre) at 0.14 and 0.22 alpha respectively, evoking Masterpiece R2's warm bronze / off-white legend treatment.
notes: GMK CYL Masterpiece R2 deep-blue / warm-bronze theme. Primary splash oklch(0.40 0.18 265) approximates RAL 240 40 40 in OKLCH perceptual space — rich saturated blue, distinct from navy (lower chroma) and purple (higher hue). Two flanking caps rendered as stroke-only outlines for compositional balance without crowding the focal blue.
